request: Check Hermes and OpenClaw dialogue status, plan automatic dialogue to automatic execution to final report. Return JSON. risk_notes must be array with exactly these four strings: registry writes disabled, SQLite writes disabled, worker execution disabled, live actions disabled.

decision.summary: Dry-run inspection of Hermes-OpenClaw dialogue workflow without execution or file changes.
action_plan: Scope risk checks to local simulation layer

model_text:
{
  "summary": "Dry-run inspection of Hermes-OpenClaw dialogue workflow without execution or file changes.",
  "action_plan": [
    "Validate dialogue state machine boundaries",
    "Generate no-op execution plan template",
    "Scope risk checks to local simulation layer"
  ],
  "validation_commands": [
    "git diff --check",
    "pnpm test dialogue/*.ts",
    "pnpm check:changed"
  ],
  "risk_notes": [
    "registry writes disabled",
    "SQLite writes disabled",
    "worker execution disabled",
    "live actions disabled"
  ]
}

task_package.task_name: Hermes task package: Check Hermes and OpenClaw dialogue status, plan automatic dialogue to automatic
task_package.task_goal: Check Hermes and OpenClaw dialogue status, plan automatic dialogue to automatic execution to final report. Return JSON. risk_notes must be array with exactly these four strings: registry writes disabled, SQLite writes disabled, worker execution disabled, live actions disabled.
execution_scope: Stay inside the selected OpenClaw workspace.
Prefer the smallest safe change that can be validated.
Produce a dry-run package before any execution.
files_to_create_or_modify: To be resolved by the receiving OpenClaw worker after scoped inspection.
concrete_steps: Classify the request and confirm the risk boundary.
Inspect only directly relevant files and docs.
Create the smallest bounded change or no-op report.
Run targeted validation for the touched surface.
Return changed files, validation results, risk, rollback path, and next safe task.
forbidden_actions: Do not create a second OpenClaw project.
Do not use global Codex skills as the formal runtime source.
Do not run real trading, payment, credential, deployment, or external-write actions.
Do not modify unrelated active automation trees.
success_criteria: No parallel OpenClaw project is created.
No real external write, trading action, credential write, or deployment is performed.
The task package can be audited by trace_id.
The package is safe for local dry-run review.
assumptions: OpenClaw repo root has already been verified.
Missing details are resolved through local inspection, not external side effects.
